title: Digital services for Businesses - Canada.ca
content:
## Digital services for businesses
Our digital services make it faster and easier to handle your company's tax matters. You, your employee, or your representative can file, pay, and access detailed information about your tax accounts - all online, all at your fingertips. Save time - go online!

## Select the digital service for you:
If you're a business owner that interacts online with the Canada Revenue Agency on various business accounts: My Business Account - Register or sign in
If you act on behalf of a business either as an employee or a representative: Represent a Client - Register or sign in
If you report your business income on a personal income tax return: My Account - Register or sign in
GST/HST return, rebate, or election
T2 (corporation) using Corporation Internet Filing
T2 (corporation) using information from T2 Auto-fill
T1 (self-employed/sole proprietorship)
Other information returns and slips
T5018 (statement of contract payment)
B249 (air travellers security charge)
B275 (softwood lumber products export charge)
View all file options
View all pay options
GST/HST return, PSB rebate, or election

To receive updates when new information is added to our website, you can:
- Subscribe to a CRA electronic mailing list .
- Add our RSS feeds to your feed reader.
